title: Method for controlling unlocking and related products
abstract: A method for controlling unlocking and related products are provided. An electronic device (1000) includes at least one processor (580) and a computer readable storage coupled to the at least one processor (580). The computer readable storage stores at least one computer executable instruction thereon, which when executed by the at least one processor (580), cause the at least one processor (580) to carry out actions, including: obtaining a face image; carrying out a group of rough features and a group of fine features from the face image; carrying out a verification operation for the group of rough features and the group of the fine features; carrying out a next unlocking process when verification of the group of rough features and the group of fine features is passed.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) AĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â comprisingĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â applicationĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â (AP)Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â recognitionĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â AP,Ă‚Â wherein, theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â recognitionĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â obtainĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image; theĂ‚Â APĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â extract,Ă‚Â aĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â roughĂ‚Â featuresĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â fineĂ‚Â featuresĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â faceĂ‚Â image,Ă‚Â carryĂ‚Â outĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â verificationĂ‚Â operationĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â roughĂ‚Â featuresĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â fineĂ‚Â features,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â carryĂ‚Â outĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â nextĂ‚Â unlockingĂ‚Â processĂ‚Â whenĂ‚Â verificationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â roughĂ‚Â featuresĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â groupĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â fineĂ‚Â featuresĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â passed.
